dnd_potion_healing.name: Potion of Healing
dnd_potion_healing.description: A ruby draught that knits wounds in a warm rush.

dnd_potion_mana.name: Draught of Arcane Vigor
dnd_potion_mana.description: Bottled starlight; it rekindles a caster's spent power.

dnd_shield_valor.name: Shield of Valor
dnd_shield_valor.description: Blessed oak and steel that turns aside the cruelest blow.

dnd_antitoxin.name: Vial of Antitoxin
dnd_antitoxin.description: Bitter, chalky, and very good at flushing venom.

dnd_holy_avenger.name: Holy Avenger
dnd_holy_avenger.description: A greatsword that hums with righteous fire in the presence of evil.
